selection_method: CH-SVM and FFT12-LR selected by stratified grouped CV on train+validation work groups; fusion alpha selected on grouped OOF train+validation predictions; held-out test used once after refit.
sensitivity_note: Fixed-config shortcut-risk sensitivity: self-author strings were masked in text before feature extraction. Base configs and fusion alpha are inherited from the original ROSTories-cleaned grouped-CV run; no held-out test labels are used for selection.
